name: prompt-engineering-expert
description: Portable, cross-IDE prompt-engineering capability. One canonical Agent Skill plus a sub-agent and slash commands for Claude Code; renders for Cursor, Codex, and Antigravity ship in the repo.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering-expert
